<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/fixings"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns captured fixings. Filter by indexName and optionally by fixingDate or date range (fromDate/toDate).

  as={"h2"}
